name: ts-i18n
description: Fast, fully-typed TypeScript i18n loader with YAML/TS support and type generation.
author: Chris Breuer <chris@stacksjs.org>

scripts.build: for dir in packages/*; do if [ -f "$dir/package.json" ]; then echo "Building $dir" && bun run --cwd $dir build; fi; done
scripts.fresh: bunx rimraf node_modules/ bun.lock && bun i
scripts.release: bun --bun run changelog:generate && bunx --bun bumpx prompt --recursive
scripts.release:patch: bun --bun run changelog:generate && bunx --bun bumpx patch --recursive --yes && cd packages/ts-i18n && bun publish
scripts.release:minor: bun --bun run changelog:generate && bunx --bun bumpx minor --recursive --yes && cd packages/ts-i18n && bun publish
scripts.release:major: bun --bun run changelog:generate && bunx --bun bumpx major --recursive --yes && cd packages/ts-i18n && bun publish
